prompt: Approved bridge pressure counter node: choose action.
why_v1: When the best response to pressure is to push back now, raising is stronger than drifting into a passive line.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. To push back now is the stronger response to pressure, so raising beats drifting into a passive line.
feedback_acceptable_v1: Acceptable. Calling keeps the hand in play, but raising is the stronger counter because it pushes back now instead of just absorbing pressure.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. A passive response just absorbs pressure here, while raising pushes back now and applies the stronger counter.
